_comments: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values.
githubToken: Fine-grained token at https://github.com/settings/tokens with 'repo' scope
repo: Repository in owner/name format, e.g. 'mojoaar/linkhive-data'
title: Browser tab title override (leave empty for default)
description: Meta description for SEO/sharing (leave empty for default)
author: Displayed in the settings footer, e.g. 'Morten Johansen'
